Class: RoutingV2

bemap.RoutingV2(context, optionsopt)

new RoutingV2(context, optionsopt)

BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - RoutingV2 (v1.5) Modern, Promise-based router. Single endpoint `POST service/routing/1.0` covers point-to-point routing (with vias), matrix and isochrone calculations — `routingMode` discriminates. Wire shape mirrors the BeMap server contract (cross-checked against `bemap-flutter-api/lib/service/routing/provider/routing_server.dart`). In-flight requests are tracked by `requestId` and aborted via `cancel(id)`.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context. Mandatory.
options Object <optional>
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/routing/bemap-routing-v2.js, line 20

Extends

  • bemap.ServiceV2

Methods

calculate(request, optionsopt) → {Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>}

Calculate one or several routes (or a matrix, or an isochrone, depending on `request.routingMode`).
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
request bemap.RoutingRequest
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
signal AbortSignal <optional>
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/routing/bemap-routing-v2.js, line 37
Returns:
Type
Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>

cancel(requestId) → {Boolean}

Cancel an in-flight request. Returns `true` when the request was found and aborted, `false` otherwise.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
requestId String
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/routing/bemap-routing-v2.js, line 164
Returns:
Type
Boolean

isochrone(origin, criterion, optionsopt) → {Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>}

Compute the reachable-area polygon for a given budget (time in seconds, distance in metres or — with an EV profile — energy in Wh).
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
origin bemap.Coordinate | bemap.CoordinateSat | bemap.RoutingDestination
criterion Object
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
budget Number Budget value passed as `isoChroneLimit`.
criterias Array.<String> <optional>
 Defaults to [FASTEST] (time-based budget).
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
routingVehicleProfile bemap.RoutingVehicleProfile <optional>
options Array.<String> <optional>
outputLanguage String <optional>
departureTime Date | Number | String <optional>
signal AbortSignal <optional>
geoserver String <optional>
requestId String <optional>
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/routing/bemap-routing-v2.js, line 138
Returns:
Type
Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>

matrix(originList, destinationList, optionsopt) → {Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>}

Compute a duration / distance matrix between every origin and every destination. The Worker uses `matrixStartCount` to discriminate origins from destinations inside the flat `destinations` list.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
originList Array.<(bemap.RoutingDestination|bemap.Coordinate|bemap.CoordinateSat)>
destinationList Array.<(bemap.RoutingDestination|bemap.Coordinate|bemap.CoordinateSat)>
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
routingCriterias Array.<String> <optional>
options Array.<String> <optional>
routingVehicleProfile bemap.RoutingVehicleProfile <optional>
outputLanguage String <optional>
departureTime Date | Number | String <optional>
signal AbortSignal <optional>
geoserver String <optional>
requestId String <optional>
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/routing/bemap-routing-v2.js, line 99
Returns:
Type
Promise.<bemap.RoutingResponse>
